name: collector aggregates defect escape rate from the rubric loop (defects discovered after promotion) as a Performance metric
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs && printf '{"defects_post_promote": 1, "promotions": 10}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs/escape.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric defect-escape --since 30d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=performance' out.txt && grep -q 'defect_escape=0.10' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
